rationale: The grammar 'starts from atomic formulas and closes under connectives and quantifiers', so def:atomic-formula is the load-bearing base of the recursion and was missing. Added.
notes: Granularity flag (not enacted): the statement says 'first-order language L', but the current dep is the generic def:language rather than def:fo-language (0056). Reviewer to decide whether the FO-specific node is intended. The connective/quantifier closure steps are ambient. Note def:formula and def:wff-pred are two distinct 'formula' nodes; their relationship may also warrant review.
